_comment: Canonical GPU relative-performance index, blended from THREE real published sources (each normalized to RTX 5090=100, then scaled so RTX 5090=197.5): TechPowerUp 'Relative Performance' (~25-game aggregate, weight 0.70, the gaming-accuracy anchor), PassMark G3D (weight 0.15, fine-grained tie-breaker), and NotebookCheck 'Performance Rating' / 3DMark blend (weight 0.15). Weights renormalize over whichever sources cover a card. ~1440p raster orientation. STRICTLY MONOTONIC: a higher value always means strictly faster (ties nudged by 0.1). Keyed by gpuModel. Server requires this file; public/script.js keeps an identical copy (sync both on edit). Regenerate via scripts/_blendIndex.js. To add a GPU, insert it at the correct rank with a value between its neighbours. Last rebuilt 2026-06-20.
